rationale: Separated ternary operators into explicit if/else statements and extracted three helper functions (getDefaultLimit, getStrictLimit, getLenientLimit) to improve c8 branch instrumentation

Separated compound condition (!idempotencyKey || !isMutativeMethod) into two explicit if statements. Also refactored Redis availability check to make branches explicit. Limitation: RxJS tap operator branches not fully instrumentable by c8

Private field initialization branches (lines 12-16, 18-20) not executable in unit tests. Only the ternary operator `signal ?? 'unknown'` provides testable branch. Ceiling: NestJS services with side effects in constructor/getters
Requires detailed examination of metrics calculation branches
Requires detailed examination of lock monitoring branches
File system and AWS S3 integration branches hard to test without mocking file I/O
